calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-01-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-01-2010 Text Ruling

Default Prove-Up Hearing As To Defendant Advanced Global Connections, Llc., Only.
Off Calendar Nov-19-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Wendy Pun, #12891.

Elenor M. Roman, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Citibank, N.A.
Richard Souza, Senior Vice President for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Advanced Global Connections, LLC.
Default was entered against defendant on August 24, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Citibank, N.A., and against the Defaulted Defendant Advanced Global Connnections, LLC as follows:

Damages/Principal - $279,729.02.
Attorney's Fees - $43,543.50.
Costs - $1,608.68, for a total judgment in the amount of $324,881.20.

It is further Ordered that plaintiff is the owner of the collateral described in the San Francisco Sheriff's Department inventory attached to the judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2009 Set For Trial On Mar-01-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

RULING: After hearing, Plaintiff Citibank, N.A.'s Application For Writ Of Attachment As To Defendant Jinsoo S. Terry is stayed by defendant's bankruptcy, COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

RULING: AFTER HEARING, THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Citibank, N.A.'s Application For Writ Of Attachment As To Defendant Sam Terry III aka Samuel Walker Terry III is DENIED. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Eleanor M. Roman, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: Citibank, N.A.
Gerard D. Launay, Atty. for Defendant and opposing party: Sam Terry
Jinsoo Terry, Defendant appearing in Propria Persona

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Citibank, N.A.'s Application For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment v. Defendant Jinsoo Terry is granted, except that the residence at 111 Avenida Drive, Berkeley California shall not be attached, as Plaintiff's verified complaint asserts that Defendant Terry conveyed all of her interest in 111 Avenida Drive in March 2009. Order was signed in open court. JUDGE RICHARD B. ULMER, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
